shortDescription: Income-generating duplex in Parkdale with 5 bedrooms across two self-contained units.
fullDescription: Welcome to 165 Jameson Avenue in the vibrant Parkdale neighbourhood. This income-producing duplex features two self-contained units, each with its own entrance and utilities. The main living area opens onto a spacious combined living and dining area flooded with afternoon sun. The kitchen is a chef’s dream with quartz countertops, a large island, and high-end stainless-steel appliances. The sleeping quarters comprise 5 comfortable bedrooms, the largest enjoying a private ensuite bathroom. The finished lower level adds valuable living space with a recreation room, extra bathroom, and storage. Enjoy a 90+ walk score with parks, cafes, schools, and transit all within minutes.
keyFeatures: Open kitchen with waterfall island and pot lights
Minutes to parks, shops, and restaurants
